name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-11
title: dispatch scripts do not sanity-check policy-block output before embedding
description: Both dispatch-feature-edit.py and dispatch-spec-update.py call policy-block.py and embed its stdout, but neither checks the subprocess return code or that the output begins with the sentinel. A silent failure would yield a prompt with no policy guidance.

history.note: superseded by CONTRACT-BACKLOG-1 (collapses into versioned schema-based subagent prompt contract; per cluster analysis 2026-05-18, this concern becomes trivial or free once the prompt is a structured contract with inspect/edit surface)
